## Outside Vendors

We do allow the use of outside vendors. All outside vendors must sign an outside vendor agreement and be approved by the venue manager at least 10 days prior to your event date. All vendors must show proof of general liability insurance at least 10 days prior to your event date. All vendors are responsible for cleaning up after themselves and removing any trash they bring into the venue. \* Vendors are not allowed to consume spirits on the premises before, during, or after an event.

Outside Vendor Agreements

Please send an email to [**Lisa@2616commerce.com**](mailto:Lisa@2616commerce.com) to request an outside vendor agreement form.

Worked with Lisa to have my fraternity’s formal here for two years in a row. We’ve used the 3rd floor penthouse as well as the rooftop, and both were great! She is super responsive in communication and everything is customized exactly how you want it. I would highly recommend using them for your event if you want it to be quick, easy, and stress free on your end. Price is pretty reasonable for a good view of the downtown area and being on a rooftop especially.

**– Jack L.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Great venue with multiple levels!!! Perfect for corporate events, weddings, or private parties!

**– Rob H.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Great venue, very pretty at night. Awesome view of the skyline. Planning process was very easy going. Lisa was great with answering questions and Stephen was very helpful at the event. Thank y'all for all the help and a great experience.

**– Ashlynn M.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We had our corporate Holiday Party at 2616 Commerce Event Center and everything was perfect! The staff was so helpful and easy to work with. They were available the entire night for spur of the moment lighting changes and really anything we needed. No request was too big or small. I can't say enough about all they did to help our night be a huge success. I whole-heartedly recommend 2616 Commerce Event Center for your special event!

**– Shelley J.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

If you Need An Affordable Florist for your Event All Things Flowers 💐 is Amazing. Great to work with And Stunning Flowers

**– Jazzy D.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We used this event center for a themed charity event in April 2024. Lisa and her staff were fantastic to work with and very accommodating. For example: There were threats of rain and we had a band playing outside on the patio. We decided the event must go on. 2 hours into the event and it began to rain. The band took their equipment to safety inside for protection. Next thing I knew without even asking, Lisa and her crew put up a tent for them to play under and our band was playing again. In addition, we had a few last minute request for extra tables. It was no problem and quickly handled. It is this type of service that has us booking this event center again. We are looking forward to working with Lisa and her crew again next year in 2025.

**– S. W.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

## Outside Vendors

We do allow the use of outside vendors. All outside vendors must sign an outside vendor agreement and be approved by the venue manager at least 10 days prior to your event date. All vendors must show proof of general liability insurance at least 10 days prior to your event date. All vendors are responsible for cleaning up after themselves and removing any trash they bring into the venue. \* Vendors are not allowed to consume spirits on the premises before, during, or after an event.

Outside Vendor Agreements

Please send an email to [**Lisa@2616commerce.com**](mailto:Lisa@2616commerce.com) to request an outside vendor agreement form.

Worked with Lisa to have my fraternity’s formal here for two years in a row. We’ve used the 3rd floor penthouse as well as the rooftop, and both were great! She is super responsive in communication and everything is customized exactly how you want it. I would highly recommend using them for your event if you want it to be quick, easy, and stress free on your end. Price is pretty reasonable for a good view of the downtown area and being on a rooftop especially.

**– Jack L.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Great venue with multiple levels!!! Perfect for corporate events, weddings, or private parties!

**– Rob H.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Great venue, very pretty at night. Awesome view of the skyline. Planning process was very easy going. Lisa was great with answering questions and Stephen was very helpful at the event. Thank y'all for all the help and a great experience.

**– Ashlynn M.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We had our corporate Holiday Party at 2616 Commerce Event Center and everything was perfect! The staff was so helpful and easy to work with. They were available the entire night for spur of the moment lighting changes and really anything we needed. No request was too big or small. I can't say enough about all they did to help our night be a huge success. I whole-heartedly recommend 2616 Commerce Event Center for your special event!

**– Shelley J.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

If you Need An Affordable Florist for your Event All Things Flowers 💐 is Amazing. Great to work with And Stunning Flowers

**– Jazzy D.**

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We used this event center for a themed charity event in April 2024. Lisa and her staff were fantastic to work with and very accommodating. For example: There were threats of rain and we had a band playing outside on the patio. We decided the event must go on. 2 hours into the event and it began to rain. The band took their equipment to safety inside for protection. Next thing I knew without even asking, Lisa and her crew put up a tent for them to play under and our band was playing again. In addition, we had a few last minute request for extra tables. It was no problem and quickly handled. It is this type of service that has us booking this event center again. We are looking forward to working with Lisa and her crew again next year in 2025.
